content: Backend: Update calc_engine.py to handle studded 'less_type' (L/NL) - subtract L-type carat weights (1 carat = 0.2g) from net weight before gold/making calculations
Frontend: Add L/NL radio buttons to each studded charge entry in ItemCalculator.js, update net weight calculation
Update BillPage/BillPrintView to display L/NL info and adjusted weights
Update backend test file and verify calculations
Test the full diamond item flow end-to-end
